generator_frequency.label: NPC Generation Frequency
generator_frequency.description: Generate new NPC concepts every N turns

introduction_enabled.label: Auto-Introduce NPCs
introduction_enabled.description: Let the Introduction Agent decide when to introduce new characters

max_unintroduced_pool.label: Max Unintroduced Pool
max_unintroduced_pool.description: Maximum NPCs kept in the unintroduced pool before generation stops

mutation_schema.npc_introductions: array of objects: {npc_id: string, name: string (the character's name as mentioned in the story), first_impression: string (one sentence describing how they met the player), notes: string (optional evolving observations about the character)}
